title: PM Decision-History Query Narrowing
objective: Add backward-compatible query narrowing to the existing PM decision-history read seam and update the PM workfront history panel to request only row-relevant issue history with a bounded limit.
required_inputs: PM Lane 007 live Supabase empty-history parity verdict
Focused backend, build, typecheck, and Playwright validation evidence
constrained_outputs: GET /api/v1/reads/decision-history accepts repeated entity_id query params while preserving no-param full-history behavior
GET /api/v1/reads/decision-history accepts optional limit with ge=1 validation and a silent cap at 100 after newest-first sorting
PM workfront history panel requests row-scoped decision history with entity_id params and limit=25
Rows without decision entity IDs do not fall back to a full-history fetch

Focused tests cover repeated entity_id, limit=1 newest result, limit=0 validation, limit=250 cap, scoped browser history requests, no mutation from history open, and unchanged PM-clicked return_to_lead behavior

No new endpoint, no SQL or schema migration, no live database write, no service admission, no auth or ingress widening, no assignment mutation, no schedule mutation, and no autonomous AI business-state action
validation_steps: Run focused mutation-seam PM workfront read-model, PM issue disposition, and pipeline integration pytest slices with SEAM_STORE_BACKEND=memory
Run operations-web typecheck after build-generated Next types are available
Run focused Playwright browser smoke for the PM workfront route
Run packet JSON validation and git diff whitespace checks before publication
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-008 changes only an existing read endpoint, operations-web read behavior, and focused tests. No SQL, schema migration, production data write, auth, ingress, or new mutation authority is authorized.
